intent: Clear open issue backlog on branch fix/issue-backlog-clearance-20260712
approach: Tiered close: A verify-close already fixed; B implement remaining UX from 20260712; C bulk close duplicates/stale/low with reason; D defer god-file maintainability as wontfix_this_milestone or keep open deferred.

waves.name: close-A-already-fixed
actions: Verify active-session + multi-line KB + doctor probe snapshot on branch (commits a8a941a7, 99077998)
Close issues with resolution fixed + evidence paths/commits

waves.name: implement-B-ux
actions: 003/007: docs/doctor or install summary note about global CLI shadow + re-install consumer hooks
006: improve audit cite zero-coverage copy for session_id correlation
005: soft-nudge or doc for path-overlap cite accounting; avoid large schema change

waves.name: bulk-triage-C
actions: Close duplicates of god-file / knip / i18n / hook-order as duplicate of canonical
Close stale Cursor/quarantine/test-seed as fixed or wontfix with reason
Leave genuine medium backlog open only when still valid and not superseding

waves.name: defer-D
actions: Mark deferred or close as wontfix_this_milestone with pointer to future maintainability milestone

definition_of_done: Open registered count reduced primarily via justified closes; 001-007 resolved (fixed or wontfix with rationale); branch green enough for PR.
